title: Sony announces the end of physical PlayStation discs starting in 2028 and sparks a wave of criticism in the industry
summary: The decision to stop disc production generates player petitions, executive statements, and an intense debate about the future of physical media.

title: Leaks reveal a story expansion pass and multiple DLCs for Final Fantasy VII Revelation
summary: Store listings suggest that the end of the remake trilogy in 2027 will not be the end of Cloud's story and that there will be additional narrative content.

title: Suicide Squad developers confess that development almost drove them away from the industry due to its dehumanization
summary: The creators of the failed narrative action game describe how the process became mechanical and frustrating, feeling they were following a spreadsheet instead of creating a video game.

title: Cyberpunk 2077 reaches 40 million copies sold and CD Projekt Red celebrates the milestone
summary: The futuristic RPG surpasses another sales barrier years after its controversial launch, establishing itself as one of the most successful titles from the Polish studio.

title: Valve's first Steam Machines suffer a serious hardware failure dubbed 'Red Line of Death'
summary: Several users report a critical defect in the consoles reminiscent of the feared Xbox 360 Red Ring of Death, while the company investigates the issue.

title: The studio behind Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 argues that imperfect games are more interesting
summary: Sandfall Interactive asserts that they do not seek perfection, but rather to make creative decisions that generate divided opinions to avoid monotony in the industry.

title: Relic Entertainment announces a new Company of Heroes spin-off focused on wave defense
summary: The studio reveals a more accessible tactical strategy game within the franchise, scheduled for release in late July 2026.

title: Wrong Organ delays its ambitious new project and showcases Carcass Clad as a less narrative alternative
summary: The studio behind Mouthwashing postpones its biggest title for polish while detailing its next game, focused almost exclusively on gameplay.

title: Rust's Common Ground update adds a realistic apartment rental system
summary: Players can now rent virtual properties from other users, introducing a capitalist and social survival dynamic to the multiplayer game.

title: Steven Spielberg acquires the rights to The Mandela Catalogue and Hollywood seeks more internet phenomena
summary: The filmmaker joins the studios' race to adapt the biggest creepypasta legends, while the industry explores viral works like The Backrooms.

title: The studio behind Thick as Thieves suffers another round of mass layoffs and barely retains a dozen employees
summary: OtherSide Entertainment is left virtually without a team after the latest cuts, seriously jeopardizing the future of the promising stealth simulator.

title: A huge accidental discount and the high official price of GTA 6 spark debate about its accessibility
summary: While one player gets the game for two dollars due to a card error, an analysis shows that its standard cost makes it one of the most expensive releases in history.

title: Captain America's new summer outfit in Marvel Rivals goes viral for its realistic animation
summary: The character's swimsuit skin captures the community's attention due to the prominent and striking physical effect of its model in the hero shooter game.

title: Honkai: Star Rail launches version 4.4 with new codes and content
summary: The update 'In Ravages Does the Whistle Sound' is now available for all players, accompanied by rewards and promotional codes from the livestream.

title: The global RAM crisis affects game development and triggers multi-million dollar investments
summary: While one game reduces its requirements due to the shortage, SK hynix invests 60 billion in new plants and Meta develops hybrid solutions for servers.

title: The exclusive cooperative game Orbitals for Switch 2 will receive a complete physical edition on cartridge
summary: The action-puzzle game, initially planned only in digital format, will be available in physical stores for Nintendo's new console.

title: Analysts dismiss that Nintendo will abandon physical format after PlayStation's announcement
summary: Industry experts assure that Nintendo's game distribution strategy will remain unchanged despite Sony's decision to eliminate discs.

title: Robert Henrysson resigns as CEO of Supermassive Games after a decade of uneven releases
summary: The executive leaves his position weeks after the release of his latest title, closing an eleven-year cycle marked by a high frequency of releases with mixed commercial results.

title: The Magic: The Gathering community calls for the banning of Sol Ring in Commander
summary: An opinion piece argues that removing the iconic card from the most popular format would significantly improve the balance and strategic diversity of games.

title: Former Dragon Age lead writer calls generative AI in video games a 'virulent plague'
summary: David Gaider attacks the use of generative artificial intelligence in development, urging the industry to reject it entirely as a creative and labor threat.
